title: treasury / stablecoin / genius act | Regulatory Guidance | Treasury Proposes Rule to Implement the GENIUS Act's Require...
summary: The U.S. Treasury's FinCEN and OFAC issued a joint proposed rule on April 8, 2026 to implement the GENIUS Act's anti-money laundering and sanctions compliance requirements for permitted payment stablecoin issuers (PPSIs). The proposal would treat PPSIs as financial institutions under the Bank Secrecy Act and require them to maintain effective sanctions compliance programs.
